target: 65. Pseudo-Loop, and Unity
Sensei, aren't you hungry? I made some sandwiches. If you'd like...
…You're an unusual guy... Cooking even at a time like this.
(Come to think of it, Sensei has been wearing gloves this whole time. I wonder if it's to hide those burn-like marks.)
(The mark from where Haine's right eye hit her 14 years ago in the summer on Mt. Takanosu...)
That day, Ryunosuke-san entered inside you, didn't he, Sensei.
...Ah, you saw it too, didn't you. Our past...
I was surprised at first when <color=#GF_TIPS_037>Ryunosuke</color> entered me. I got used to it soon enough, though.
Ryunosuke-san is strong like Ushio, and we've been saved so many times thanks to you, Sensei...
...If I can do it, I want to fight as much as possible. The truth is, I don't want to call Ryunosuke here.
You really care for your brother, don't you, Sensei.
How did you come to that conclusion?
I have a younger sister too, so I kind of understand.
You don't want to make your brother... fight the terrifying Shadow that killed him. To keep Ryunosuke-san from going through something scary again.
...You. That's taking too much of a bird's-eye view.
Is... that so?
It's just for my own sake. Ryunosuke is using a human body. If he fought seriously with a Shadow's reflexes, my body would be torn to pieces.
Even back then, my shoulder was dislocated, my ankle was sprained, and I had full-body muscle pain that left me unable to move properly for four or five days. It was unbearable, you know?
(That's true... A normal body wouldn't be able to withstand it...)
How do you read the shadow's movements tonight, Sensei?
Let's see... Up until now, Mio has come to Kofune on the night of the 22nd, but she will probably come here this time.
Mio has mostly been ignoring the real Mio. Mio is clearly acting under orders.
Orders from "above" that take priority over a Shadow's instinct to kill the original... In other words, Haine's orders.
You're turning that to our advantage, then.
Yes.
("That plan" for Mio... I wonder if it'll work out? No, I'm sure Ushio can do it!)
Does Haine know my location too because of this mark on my arm?
We'll find that out soon too.
(The enemy is looping too... And if they know my location...)
Then the first move is even more crucial.
Yeah. We'll intercept them with maximum fighting force right from the start...!
I-I-It's the real deal!! It's Kaori Koyuba-chan!! The real thing is suuuuuper cute!!!
Aha, ahaha, thank you very much.
Shinpei-kun, why didn't you tell me on the phone first!?!? If I knew I was going to meet Kaori-chan, I would've mentally prepared myself!!!
You're being a bit loud, Totsumura-san!! Your voice is way too loud!!
Even so, Ushio-chan...
Eeeeeeeeeehhh!!
So you ended up calling Kaori-chan too.
I thought about a lot of things, but I think this is the best way in the end.
However, I plan to have her avoid any actions where her figure might be seen by the Shadows.
Yeah, that's probably for the best.
(As long as Koyuba-san is alone, the risk of her being scanned and having her memories copied increases.)
(Honestly, if it's just that much, it's still within an acceptable range.)
(The worst thing would be if I couldn't grasp her death—)
(And because of that, Koyuba-san's death becomes set in stone.)
(Not just Koyuba-san, but even if anyone here dies, as long as I can loop right away, there's a high chance I can save them.)
(I really can't tell Koyuba-san that I'm acting on the premise of dying...)
Shinpei, I'm done showing everyone my memories!
Totsumura-san turned completely pale... I'll go check on him for a bit.
Haha, please do.
...Um, Kofune-san.
Hm, what's wrong?
Well... it's nothing major, but... After going back to my room, I thought about a lot of things.
Kofune-san... you and Ajiro-kun, you've been continuing such a difficult battle together.
Ahaha, sorry about that. My memories were pretty tough, right? Are you still feeling—
That's not what I meant...
Eh?
I... can't be you, but...
I've decided to fight with my own strength, with what I can do, to save the person important to me.
Th-That's all I wanted to say! Don't ask if there's any deep meaning behind it...!
Kaori-chan, that's...
That's super cool! You're really strong, Kaori-chan!
I'm strong...? I-Is that so?
We're counting on you! I'm so glad you became our ally, Kaori-chan!
Ushio, come here. I want to check on the weapons.
Yes, I'm coming!
Cool, huh...
Tetsu Totsumura
Are you kidding me... Are you kidding me...
It's impossible...!! Fighting monsters like that... W-We should tell everyone and have them evacuate...
Everyone? There are 700 islanders alone... It'll just cause panic.
Call for backup from the mainland... no, but the detective was killed too... Damn it!! How are we even supposed to explain this to get help...!?
By the way, why was I killed in that cave?
How should I know!!
We could only see the scenes that Ushio saw...
But what is certain is that thanks to you and Hizuru back then, Shinpei was able to loop.
You're scared out of your wits, but maybe you're the kind of guy who steps up when it counts.
Eh!!
I-I see!! I'm... a guy who steps up when it counts!!!!
Sou Hishigata
Tokiko... I...
You idiot... I told you not to do anything stupid... Dying to protect me...
You're such an idiot...
Shinpei is... planning to save everyone on the island. Me and you too, Tokiko.
He saw you being used and killed by the Shadows, and he's still trying to save you.
We have to... be his strength...!!
...Tokiko.
Mio...
I'm sorry, Mio... about Ushio-san's body... I'm so sorry...
Sis forgave you...
...As for me. I'm angry. I'm really, really angry.
...I'm sorry...
But you know. Thanks to Shin-chan's power, we're back here like this. So we can still do it over.
I'm going to do it over.
Come on, Shin-chan is calling.
Shinpei Ajiro
(...After that, Nezu-san moved to the nearby mountain with his rifle for reconnaissance.)
(We had Koyuba-san hide and prepare for the operation so our connection wouldn't be known.)
(I also told her that her main goal is to not be seen by the Shadows.)
(The premonition of battle is swelling...)
(He's not answering... Alain. Normally, he'd be home by now...)
(I wanted to confirm his safety before the battle started, though...)
(What is this feeling...!?)
(The back of my eyes hurt... Could that cliff be—)
Shinpei?
Are you okay?
Y-Yeah...
Um, I'm just a little nervous... Are we really doing this? Up here on a stage...
The operation needs a leader. Everyone wants to hear what you have to say.
But, I really can't be a leader... I-It'd be better if Sensei took charge...
What are you talking about, it has to be you, Shinpei!! If it wasn't for your power, Shinpei, we wouldn't all be gathered here like this!!
That's right, Shinpei!
Shin-chan.
...T-Then... Um... let's see...
I've... always had a habit of looking at things objectively...
Like... another version of me is looking down from a high place, thinking about things.
Then I can look out over my own position, and the situation around me.
It's like I'm always right, I don't make mistakes, and even if I do, it feels like it's someone else's problem...
By doing that, I thought I was living life pretty well.
...But. When Ushio died, I was left with nothing but regrets.
Like why didn't I even give her a single phone call, or how I should have at least come home for New Year's...
Or how I should have properly made the curry she asked for at the end... I thought I was looking at things objectively, but I wasn't...
I'm always making mistakes. Regretting things that I can't do anything about now is really painful...
It's probably impossible to never have regrets again, but...
I just... never want to feel like this again.
That's why, if I feel even a little bit like I might regret something... If I think it's bad, I'll avoid it...
I decided to run away with all my might.
...But then, I rarely end up choosing not to do something.
Even if it's something I don't want to do, I end up thinking I should have done it—
Rather than regretting it later, I figure I might as well try it...
Right now... yes... that's what I think. In other words... um...
Even if I fail in the end... and die... I want to be able to think that I used up my life completely.
I think everyone saw it, but before she died, Ushio was fighting the Shadows in secret. She lost her life trying to save Shiori-chan.
Knowing her... I think she was frustrated. She must have been... really frustrated.
I will carry on her dying wish. I won't let the end of that summer festival repeat itself!
I believe we can do it with everyone here.
...Shinpei...
—I won't say that.
You're not gonna say it!!?
Because there's no guarantee for anyone's life. I don't even know if we can fight and win.
But I won't say that those who want to run should run either. It's all my own selfishness so that I don't have any regrets.
I'm forcing you because I don't want to think later, "I should have forced everyone here."
Take up arms and fight with me!
A-Are you an idiot!! You're telling us to die for you, Shinpei-kun!? W-We aren't your pawns!!
He doesn't think of you as pawns!
Because... even though he could have run away alone at first, Shinpei kept fighting!!
That's because he wants to save everyone, right? Because he cares about everyone!!
Sure, he always has a bad way of saying things. But Shinpei is on everyone's side!!
Do you have a problem with siding with the person you like!!!!
Me too!!
M-Mio-chan!!?
Me too! For Shin-chan—
...I believe in him...!!
Me too, Shinpei! I'm your ally for life!! No matter what happens from now on! That won't change!!!
...Does everyone... know? Just how many Shadows are on this island. As things stand, there's no chance of winning.
That's right! Tell 'em!!
But... It's a life that died once anyway... I'll entrust it to Shinpei-san.
Wha!!?
E-Everyone's gone crazy!!!
Those who want to run should just run! Just us... and the people important to us, on the first ferry tomorrow morning!
The ferry is dangerous. There was a Shadow among the crew. Even as early as this morning when I arrived.
There's no other path left but to exterminate them.
D-Damn it! That's... damn it!!!
I get it...!! I'll do it!!!! Damn iiiiit!!
...Thank you, everyone...
It's not for you, Shinpei-kun!! It's to protect everyone's idol, Kaori-chan!! And, I'm fighting for Erika-chan!!!
Erika-chan?
Ah, you know, from Snack Miyako—
Acquired Key TIPS [<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_06>6th END</color>].
The limit of the loop is approaching...!?
Yes... every time I die, I return to the "limit" of time.
Since I can't return to before the limit, please think of the limit as the starting point.
My previous death was around 7:55. The starting point this time was 7:00.
Time progressed from there... and currently, it's 7:20. Imagine me walking "forward" at a constant speed.
And this limit is also moving "forward", and since it's currently slower than my pace—
As long as I live normally, it won't catch up to me, but...
That speed gets faster every time I die.
If Shinpei dies right now, where is the next starting point!?
Let's see... based on how it feels now, probably around a little past 7:00...
That was... just a little while ago!!
And if I'm killed again at the same time as last time, or even earlier, I don't think there will be a next time.
While I'm standing still, the limit will go "ahead" of me.
Even if you go back, there's no foothold there... huh.
Yes... I'll fall down... to the bottom of that pitch-black cliff.
Hey, hey, is that really true!? Isn't that just what you think, Shinpei-kun!
He, the observer, saw it. It must be a fact.
That cliff is the observation limit, the "<color=#GF_TIPS_067>Event Horizon</color>".
Event Horizon...
If you fall, your death is confirmed, and for the world after that, what Haine saw will be established as fact.
Haine realized that and came to kill Shinpei-san.
The worst!!
...Why was I found?
Before, when Ushio and I were attacked by Shadow Mio in my room, we were able to defeat her thanks to Nezu-san's rifle, right? I think Haine found out about that plan.
The only ones who know about that are me, Ushio, Nagumo-sensei, and Nezu-san... just the four of us...
It was probably me... You two weren't scanned, and Nezu has immunity.
In the final scene of that loop, I had suffered a fatal wound...
I must have engaged in combat before reaching that point, and had my memories read.
Ushio, how do Shadows exchange information with each other? Do they show their memories to others like you do?
Yeah. I think they all do that. Otherwise, they just talk or write normally... But Haine uses telepathy too!
It seems Haine can use telepathy to give simple commands to her "children", but...
Ushio is fine! It seems Haine's commands don't work on her.
...It's safe to assume that Shadows that have come into contact with Haine pseudo-loop just like we do. Shide is definitely looping.
Hey, wait a minute! Data can be carried over through loops, right?
Is there a possibility they copied my rifle!? If they did, it's dangerous here!
That's okay! Copies naturally disappear if they get too far from the Shadow that printed them.
I noticed it while trying various things. Copies can only exist within a radius of about 50 meters!
In other words, even if they copy a long-range rifle, the bullets will only fly 50 meters...
No matter if the bullets become infinite, it's meaningless if that's the case...
The enemy had the upper hand last time, but we also gained something.
With this mark, Haine also knows my location.
That's why she'll come. Haine will definitely come to see my death...!!
This time I can say that for sure. We'll settle this here tonight.
What's the plan? We can't just do the same thing as last time.
Yes, here's what I'm thinking—
"Nezu-san's rifle is the key."
"Can't we use fire?"
Nezu-san's rifle is the key. The weapon with the highest attack power here is probably the rifle. We're going to copy it.
What did you say!?
The range will become 50 meters, you know!? Even if the bullets are infinite, that's...!
Yeah, we won't be able to rely on Nezu-san's long-range shooting anymore, but...
You mean we can get an effect greater than that.
In my opinion, yes.
...Well, copying it is fine, but there's something I'm worried about.
Haine has that Shadow called Shide sticking to her, but "Shadow Stitching" didn't work on him.
Shide's 2D form is different from other Shadows... It might be meaningless no matter how much we shoot him.
When Nagumo-sensei shot me in Hiruko Cave, they used a manhole to stop it.
I believe that was something they scanned to use as a shield.
Considering they were able to materialize it instantly in the middle of combat, it's hard to think they used it out of desperation...
In other words, either Shide or Haine... or both of them, have some sort of physical weakness.
First we'll target Shide's 3D form, and once he's weakened, we'll target Haine.
Even if a fatal wound in one hit is impossible, as long as the opponent is a material with a physical body, a rifle should be able to deal a strong impact.
By continuing to attack the 3D form, if things go well, we might even be able to find Shide's weakness.
...Weaken Shide... and ultimately target Haine?
...That's right.
Just as Toki-chan said, the ultimate target is Haine.
Even though we let her escape once, we know that "Shadow Stitching" works on Haine.
It's natural to think that they scanned the manhole in order to protect Haine's shadow.
...I think so too. Shide has some uncertain elements, but Haine isn't invincible... That's our main target.
But Shinpei, is there a point in making the rifle a copy? Rather than not running out of ammo, the range is...
Sou, it's not just about not running out of ammo. There's one more huge advantage— we can use a "trap".
...Could we use fire? It's a hypothesis based on our battles so far, but fire is probably effective against Shadows.
True, when we went underground from the old ward, the flamethrower worked.
But we don't really know for sure if fire works on all Shadows, do we?
That part will be a gamble...!
Hey, hey, hey, hey!!!! The loop's limit is close, right!?!? Is this really the time for a gamble!?!?
What we used underground was a makeshift one using a spray can. Compared to a real fire, its power was like a speck, but it still managed to repel that many Stray Shadows.
So I think the hypothesis that "Shadows are weak to fire" is actually pretty spot on.
"Shadow Stitching" didn't work on Shide. If attacks on the Shadow's 2D plane don't work, I think we need to try other possibilities.
Tetsu-san, do you have any better ideas? It's a huge responsibility, though.
Guh...! I get it, I get it!! Just do whatever you want!!!
Assuming we use fire... how do you plan to use it? I don't think a makeshift flamethrower with a lighter and bug spray will be enough to take them down.
Ah...
Hm?
<color=#GF_KEY_GASOLINE>Gasoline</color>... maybe...?
